# Kiểm tra Stata edition

::: {#4655b083 .cell execution_count=1}
``` {.stata .cell-code}
display "Hello AcLab+ từ Quarto"
display "Edition: " c(edition)
display "Cores: " c(processors)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display}
```{=html}
<style>div.jp-Notebook .datagrid-container {min-height: 448px; }</style>
```
:::

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}
```

. display "Hello AcLab+ từ Quarto"
Hello AcLab+ từ Quarto

. display "Edition: " c(edition)
Edition: BE

. display "Cores: " c(processors)
Cores: 2

. 
```
:::
:::


# Đọc dữ liệu GDP Việt Nam

::: {#fb6a24a2 .cell execution_count=2}
``` {.stata .cell-code}
import delimited "data/vn_gdp_1986_2024.csv", clear case(lower)
summarize gdp_growth
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}
```

. import delimited "data/vn_gdp_1986_2024.csv", clear case(lower)
(encoding automatically selected: UTF-8)
(3 vars, 39 obs)

. summarize gdp_growth

    Variable |        Obs        Mean    Std. dev.       Min        Max
-------------+---------------------------------------------------------
  gdp_growth |         39    6.362564    1.662904       2.58       9.54

. 
```
:::
:::
